---
title: "Week 9 Write-Up"
author: "Abigail Weinstein"
date: "2026-03-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(scales)
```

## Data Description and Wrangling

```{r}

```

## Total Deaths by State

![](09_week/outputs/figures/total_illness_deaths_by_state.png)

## Proportion of Deaths by Candidate

![](09_week/outputs/figures/illness_deaths_by_winner_proportion.png)

## Total Deaths by Candidate and State

![](09_week/outputs/figures/illness_deaths_faceted_by_winner.png)
